privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task involves creating a SeisComP XML file for a real-world event (the April 2024 Hualien Earthquake). The exact parameters required (Latitude 23.819, Longitude 121.562, Depth 34.8 km, Magnitude 7.4 Mw, Agency CWA, and Description 'Hualien') are explicitly provided in the task description and accurately correspond to early public reports (e.g., USGS preliminary data and CWA reports on Wikipedia) for this historical event. I also confirmed via export_result.sh that the target output path is /home/ga/Documents/hualien_earthquake.scml and the database state is dynamically queried by the export script to validate these parameters.
